feedback.text: Good, I am a player/developer of video games who intersects by seeing as companies a lot of their workers’ work out of waste after a few years because they are so adventitious that they do not want to tell us something they will not sell more and basically want to eliminate it, now they are threatening the EULA to break down their discs when they want, something they should not do, although it is known that it is not legal and I hope nobody will do it. My preservation of video game is important, defines industry’s culture, achievements and mistakes, mistakes should never be forgotten so that they are not made again. Carefully, a citizen who wants to have what he pays for is his own property.
